## 5. ANTI-FLAG RULES (warmup safety)

```
DO:
  - Space actions 2-5 min apart (not rapid-fire)
  - Mix engagement with normal browsing
  - Vary reply length (1-5 lines, not always same)
  - Reply to different accounts (not same 3 all day)
  - Browse timeline between actions (scroll for 30 sec)

DO NOT:
  - Exceed the hard limits above under ANY circumstance
  - Post links (not until day 22)
  - Follow more than 5 accounts in 10 minutes
  - Like more than 5 posts in 5 minutes
  - Use the same reply template twice in one day
  - Reply to the same account more than 2x per day
  - Use hashtags (signals automation)
  - Post identical content to what's already in your timeline
```
